title: Halo: Campaign Evolved launches with paid early access and sparks controversy over technical issues
summary: The Halo remake arrives on PC and consoles, generating mixed reviews, performance issues, and crashes in early access.

title: The possible end of discs in PlayStation divides the industry: Ubisoft downplays it, Sega defends it
summary: Executives from Ubisoft, Sega, and other studios weigh in on the impact of a disc-less PlayStation, while experts warn of multi-million dollar losses.

title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls launches open beta, confirms Phoenix Cyclops as first DLC
summary: The Marvel fighting game crashes PlayStation Network during its beta and reveals post-launch content.

title: Microsoft tests cloud gaming with ads on Xbox for Insider subscribers
summary: The company allows free access to game streaming in exchange for watching ads, without interrupting gameplay.

title: European Union gives green light to $55 billion acquisition of Electronic Arts
summary: The acquisition by Saudi Arabia raises no competition concerns, paving the way for the deal.

title: New Resident Evil movie releases trailer, promises a faithful adaptation of the game
summary: Zach Cregger's film shows its first trailer and reveals the inspirations of Leon Kennedy's actor.

title: Insomniac shows story trailer for Marvel's Wolverine at San Diego Comic-Con
summary: The trailer reveals an unmasked Logan and advances the story, generating excitement and some criticism among fans.

title: Atari and Universal sign deal to adapt ten classic video games to film
summary: Pong, Breakout, Asteroids, and other iconic titles will hit the big screen following this agreement.

title: EA Sports FC 27 launches editions up to $150 and introduces open world
summary: The latest installment of the football simulator introduces for the first time an open-world mode and a record-priced Ultimate Plus edition.

title: Batman: Caped Crusader – Chronicles announced, a mystery game for the Luna platform
summary: The title, based on the 90s animated series, will be exclusive to Amazon's streaming platform.

title: Nintendo reveals details of Xenoblade Chronicles 2: Switch 2 Edition with new outfits and improvements
summary: The improved edition of the RPG includes additional content, graphical enhancements, and the return of Merc Assault mode.

title: Warhorse Studios trademarks Kingdom Come Salvation, possible medieval sequel with multiplayer
summary: The Czech role-playing franchise could continue with a new installment that would add online features.

title: Star Wars Zero Company reveals voice cast with actors from The Clone Wars
summary: The Star Wars tactical game will feature unique characters and a permadeath system.

title: Total War: Warhammer 40,000 shows its first full battle and revolutionizes gameplay
summary: The game introduces sweeping, suppression, and cover fire mechanics that change the fundamentals of the series.

title: Nintendo launches rewards and guides for Splatoon Raiders, while speculation mounts about its influence on Splatoon 4
summary: Nintendo's store adds in-game items and guides are published, while an article highlights its features for the next installment.

title: Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World unveils new monsters and synthesis system
summary: Square Enix provides details on battles, monster fusion, and the story of the new title in the saga.

title: Rockstar Games union meets with management, gains more members than ever
summary: The labor organization advances toward possible mandatory recognition after surpassing the membership threshold.

title: Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO releases first DLC 'Super Limit-Breaking NEO' on July 30
summary: The downloadable content adds new characters and transformations for the fighting game.

title: Michael Eisner, former Disney CEO, admits he doesn't remember approving Kingdom Hearts crossover
summary: The executive confesses his lack of memory about the creation of the game that united Disney with Final Fantasy.

title: Shawn Layden, former PlayStation head, proposes bringing back AA games to save the industry
summary: The veteran executive suggests a plan to promote mid-budget titles against big releases.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced surpasses 3.5 million sales in first 14 days
summary: The remake of the pirate classic breaks sales records, though Ubisoft announces bad news about its future.

title: Amazon clarifies that IO Interactive will continue developing the 007 franchise and does not rule out buying the studio
summary: The company denies having pulled the project from IOI and praises the success of 007: First Light.

title: Palworld: Community faces massive final boss as base guides are shared
summary: Players share strategies to optimize their bases and experience intense battles against the game's bosses.

title: Matt Damon reveals his double in Nolan's Odyssey was a woman and the movie releases in 4DX
summary: The actor highlights the work of his stunt double, while early reactions to the 4DX experience are mixed.
